summary: Regression test for Landing Page Redesign + PWA Routes. All backend APIs (13/13) and UI tests (11/11) passing. Landing page shows 'product-first' design with globe in hero, live stats bar, and correct navigation to /app. All /app routes load correctly with proper auth handling.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint doesn't exist at this path (use /api/weekly-report/{user_id} instead)

integration_issues.issue: Console error 'body stream already read' when navigating to map - doesn't break functionality but should be fixed

action_items: Minor: Fix double fetch in ImpactMap.js causing 'body stream already read' console error
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page redesign successfully implemented with product-first layout
Globe component renders in hero section using react-globe.gl
LiveStats component correctly fetches from 3 APIs (/api/actions/feed, /api/leaderboard, /api/community-funds)
CTA button navigates to /trust-test (not /app directly) - this is intentional per App.js handleEnterApp
All /app routes have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Auth-required pages (post, profile, dashboard, report) correctly show auth prompts
Post page shows form even without auth - users can view but need to sign in to submit
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign verified. All /app routes working: feed (14 action cards), map (Leaflet), opportunities (5 gated items), leaderboard (1 user), community-funds (5 communities). Auth-required pages prompt for sign-in. Weekly report API is at /api/weekly-report/{user_id} not /api/report/weekly. Minor console error in map component (body stream already read) - non-blocking.

features_verified.landing_page_hero: PASS - Globe in hero section, Live Network badge, main headline visible
features_verified.landing_page_live_stats: PASS - Shows Actions (14), Contributors (1), Communities (5), Trust Generated (20)
features_verified.landing_page_cta: PASS - 'Start contributing' button present and clickable
features_verified.landing_page_sections: PASS - How It Works, Features, Model, Architecture, Final CTA all render
features_verified.app_feed: PASS - Loads with 14 action cards showing reactions
features_verified.app_post: PASS - Form loads (auth required to submit)
features_verified.app_map: PASS - Leaflet map with category legend
features_verified.app_opportunities: PASS - 5+ opportunities with trust score gates
features_verified.api_actions_feed: PASS - Returns actions array with verification_level
